hero.title: Find your next adventure
hero.subtitle: Explore tours, maps and activities in Utopia
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search for a place, tour or cabin…

features.title: Find tours, cabins and routes
features.intro: Utopia makes it easier to explore hiking opportunities, find accommodations and plan your next trip with maps, route overviews and relevant information.

tours.title: Explore tours
tours.description: Find tours by activity, difficulty and duration. This entry point supports search, filtering and navigation to tour details.
tours.point2: Filter by level, length and type of tour

cabins.title: Cabins and accommodation
cabins.description: See cabins and other accommodations gathered on a dedicated page. Here users can get an overview of facilities, location and possible stops along the way.
cabins.point1: Go to the overview of cabins and accommodation
cabins.point3: Relevant for trip planning with stops

routes.title: Plan a route
routes.description: Use the map and route overview to plan your next tour. This part points to work with trails, stages and further support for your own tours.
routes.point1: See routes and trails on the map
routes.point3: Connect the tour to map view

activities.title: Explore by activity
activities.intro: Choose an activity and go to relevant tours, cabins and map view.

foot.title: Hiking
foot.description: Short trips, day hikes and longer walks in varied terrain.

bike.title: Cycling
bike.description: Tours and routes suitable for cycling in different areas.

cabin.title: Cabin trip
cabin.description: Cabins and accommodation that fit as a stop or destination for the tour.

ski.title: Skiing
ski.description: Areas and tours relevant for skiing and winter activities.

peakSki.title: Ski touring
peakSki.description: More demanding winter tours and ski touring areas.

paddle.title: Paddling
paddle.description: Suggestions for kayak, canoe and other calm paddling experiences.

community.title: Tours others recommend
community.intro: See short reviews from users who have done the tours before you, and find inspiration for your next trip.
community.fallbackReview: A nice tour with good experiences along the way. See tour details for more information.

easter.title: Great tours for Easter
easter.intro: Explore tour suggestions that fit the Easter holiday well, from ski tours in the mountains to calmer family-friendly options.
easter.fallbackDescription: See tour details for more information about this tour.

weather.title: Conditions in Jotunheimen
weather.headingBeforeTrip: Check the conditions before you go
weather.introBeforeTrip: See updated weather conditions for relevant destinations and get a quick assessment before planning your next trip.
weather.unavailable: Weather data is not available right now.
weather.intro: Weather and conditions are important when planning a tour, especially in the mountains. This card shows how the solution can give users a quick overview of conditions that affect route choice, equipment and timing.
weather.conditionsValue: Partly cloudy with good visibility at altitude
weather.windValue: Fresh breeze along ridges and open areas
weather.recommendationValue: Check the map, dress for changing weather and plan with a time margin
weather.footerNote: Decision support for safer trip planning

ads.heading: Relevant offers for outdoor enthusiasts
ads.intro: Approved ads from our partners. Click to explore the product or service.
ads.disclaimer: Ads are marked as sponsored content and approved by the editor before publication.

reset.heading: Test data for examiner
reset.description: Press here to restore all test data (users, tours, cabins, ads) to the seeded state. Used by the examiner during review.
reset.confirmBody: This will delete and reseed all content in the application. The action cannot be undone.
reset.bullet1: All users except the test users (bruker1–6) will be deleted
reset.bullet2: All tours, cabins, trails and ads will be replaced with the seeded set
reset.bullet3: Registrations, bookings, comments and favorites will be removed
